tools.Name: Hermes Agent
tools.Description: A self-improving, platform-agnostic AI agent that supports a built-in learning loop, allowing it to create skills from experience and manage conversation history across platforms like Telegram and Discord.
tools.Use_Case: Automating multi-step tasks, cross-platform AI interactions, and building persistent, self-evolving AI assistants on low-resource infrastructure.

tools.Name: Crawlee (Python)
tools.Description: A high-performance web scraping and browser automation library designed to build reliable, human-like crawlers with features like proxy rotation and session management.
tools.Use_Case: Extracting large-scale data from websites to build datasets for LLM pre-training, RAG applications, and AI agents.

tools.Name: Sirchmunk
tools.Description: An indexless, embedding-free retrieval system that searches directly over raw data using Monte Carlo Evidence Sampling to find relevant information efficiently.
tools.Use_Case: Real-time, context-aware information retrieval from massive local file repositories without the overhead of maintaining traditional vector databases.
